name: Dendrometer (MDS)
description: Trunk diameter sensor for measuring Maximum Daily Shrinkage (MDS) in micrometers (µm). Publishes trunkDiameter in µm via MQTT. The crop-health engine computes MDS = max(diameter) - min(diameter) over a 24h window and compares against the reference MDS for the species and phenological stage from BioOrchestrator.
